title: Governed ML Controls Complete
exit_criteria_met: Trusted label policy artifacts are enforced with required ambiguity rejection criteria.
Offline training cycles require holdout windows and MT5 certification evidence when touching live execution.
Model governance enforcement blocks online self-tuning and unapproved live-touching models.
No online self-tuning exists in live/demo execution through enforced registry checks.
code_changes: src/agentic_forex/goblin/models.py: added TrustedLabelPolicy, OfflineTrainingCycle, OfflineTrainingStatus; ModelRegistryEntry extended with label_policy_path, training_cycle_path, online_self_tuning_enabled
src/agentic_forex/goblin/controls.py: added write_trusted_label_policy, write_offline_training_cycle, enforce_ml_governance; write_model_registry_entry now links label/training artifacts
src/agentic_forex/goblin/__init__.py: exported new ML models and control functions
Goblin/contracts/model-registry.md: added governed ML enforcement rules
tests/test_goblin_ml.py: added targeted P11 governance coverage
assumptions: Model registry approval is evaluated when model output touches live execution via the explicit governance gate.
Latest training cycle linkage uses deterministic lexical ordering of cycle artifact paths under the model directory.
